headlines.title: TotalEnergies Sees Stronger Q2 Profit as Refining and Oil Trading Surge
headlines.summary: TotalEnergies expects higher cash flows from its oil production and strong refining margins and oil trading results to boost second-quarter profits compared to the prior quarter, as oil prices rose and fuel markets tightened in the wake of the Iran war. “Downstream results and ca

headlines.title: India Hikes Diesel and Jet Fuel Export Tax
headlines.summary: India has hiked the export duties it will be charging on exports of diesel and jet fuel for the two weeks starting July 16, as the return of the Hormuz crisis is set to further tighten fuel markets. headlines.title: As Ukraine Cripples Russian Refining, Global Diesel Markets Pay the Price
headlines.summary: Since March, Ukraine has systematically dismantled Russia’s refining system, driving crude processing to its lowest level in 21 years and forcing Moscow to ban exports of gasoline, jet fuel and diesel. headlines.title: Five Oil and Gas Stocks Ready for a Hormuz Spike and a Hawkish Fed
headlines.summary: Two shocks are hitting energy investors at once, and they point in opposite directions. The first is obvious. headlines.title: U.S. Strikes Iran Again as Brent Slips Despite Escalating Conflict
headlines.summary: The oil market is treating another US-Iran escalation as background noise. The U.S. launched another wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday, expanding attacks on military targets along the country's southern coast. Brent crude barely flinched. headlines.title: World-First Floating Wind Technology to Help Power Oil Rigs
headlines.summary: It’s not often that wind power and oil and gas are mentioned in the same breath. The rare occasion concerns a new type of offshore wind turbine launched in China that will power the extraction of fossil fuels by offshore oil platforms.
